title: Proclamation No. 1088, s. 2006
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1088

DECLARING TUESDAY, JUNE 20, 2006, AS SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE CITY OF LIPA

WHEREAS , the City of Lipa was made a chartered city on June 20 1947, by virtue of Republic Act No. 162;

WHEREAS , Tuesday, June 20, 2006, marks the 59 th foundation anniversary of the City of Lipa;

WHEREAS , it is but fitting and proper that the people of the City of Lipa be given full opportunity to celebrate the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, JOAQUIN C. LAGONERA , Acting Executive Secretary, by authority of Her Excellency, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , do hereby declare Tuesday, June 20, 2006, as special (non-working) day in the City , of Lipa.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 14th day of June, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Six.

By authority of the President: (Sgd.) JOAQUIN C. LAGONERA Acting Executive Secretary

By the Acting Executive Secretary: (Sgd.) EDWIN R. ENRILE Undersecretary

Source : CDAsia
